interactions.sharedContract: Entitlement/quota grants gate billing account, subscription, usage, and payment behaviour
interactions.ownershipBoundary: Entitlements owns allow/deny state; billing owns account/invoice/payment state
interactions.failureBehaviour: billing must fail closed or remain pending when entitlement is absent
interactions.retryIdempotencyBehaviour: idempotency keys on meter/billing events; retries never duplicate charges

interactions.sharedContract: Billing lifecycle may enqueue/coordinate provider workflows for dunning/cancel/export actions
interactions.ownershipBoundary: Billing owns money state; workflow owns orchestration run state
interactions.failureBehaviour: workflow unavailable leaves billing action pending/degraded, not silently successful
interactions.orderingRequirement: billing state mutation records before external workflow side effect when money state changes
interactions.retryIdempotencyBehaviour: workflow ids/idempotency keys prevent duplicate external runs

interactions.sharedContract: Workflow status changes dispatch notification intents through notification transports
interactions.ownershipBoundary: Workflow owns state transition; notifications own channel preference and delivery log
interactions.failureBehaviour: notification failure records suppressed/failed and does not roll back completed workflow unless workflow declares notification-required
interactions.orderingRequirement: workflow transition occurs before notification dispatch
interactions.retryIdempotencyBehaviour: notification dispatch is idempotent by event/delivery key and retries through worker policy

interactions.producerCapability: Object storage + tenant prefixes + signed URLs
interactions.consumerCapability: Data governance: catalog, lineage, classification, PII, DSR/GDPR
interactions.sharedContract: Storage objects carry classification/lineage/governance metadata and DSR/export references
interactions.ownershipBoundary: Storage owns bytes/object lifecycle; governance owns classification/DSR semantics
interactions.failureBehaviour: governance unavailable blocks classification-sensitive destructive action
interactions.orderingRequirement: object write/scan precedes governance classification update
interactions.retryIdempotencyBehaviour: object ids and DSR ids are idempotency keys for repeated governance sync

interactions.producerCapability: Data governance: catalog, lineage, classification, PII, DSR/GDPR
interactions.consumerCapability: Tenant lifecycle: provision, suspend, delete, export
interactions.sharedContract: Tenant lifecycle consumes governance/export/DSR/legal-hold state before destructive tenant actions
interactions.ownershipBoundary: Governance owns legal/DSR state; lifecycle owns tenant state transitions
interactions.failureBehaviour: active legal hold or incomplete export blocks delete/suspend destructive steps
interactions.orderingRequirement: export/DSR/legal-hold checks precede tenant delete coordination
interactions.retryIdempotencyBehaviour: tenant lifecycle uses tenant id as idempotency key for repeated suspend/delete/export attempts

interactions.sharedContract: Privileged access mutations and support sessions emit audit-before-change records
interactions.ownershipBoundary: Privileged capability owns mutation; audit owns immutable evidence
interactions.failureBehaviour: audit failure prevents privileged mutation or records explicit failure
interactions.orderingRequirement: audit event must be emitted before privileged state mutation
interactions.retryIdempotencyBehaviour: audit resource id/action deduplicate review evidence and preserve retry safety

interactions.sharedContract: Service catalog displays provider exposure and readiness without granting access by itself
interactions.ownershipBoundary: Catalog owns source classification; provider readiness owns adapter-confirmed health
interactions.failureBehaviour: provider unreachable surfaces degraded/not_configured, never hidden healthy
interactions.orderingRequirement: catalog classification exists before readiness projection
interactions.retryIdempotencyBehaviour: readiness polling is idempotent and safe to retry

interactions.producerCapability: Event bus, durable queues, DLQ, redrive
interactions.sharedContract: Events are claimed by workers, retried, dead-lettered, and redriven through explicit operator controls
interactions.ownershipBoundary: Event bus owns outbox/DLQ; workers own handler execution/liveness
interactions.failureBehaviour: handler failure retries until max attempts then DLQ; unknown handlers are not dropped
interactions.retryIdempotencyBehaviour: event idempotency key and redrive generated key prevent duplicate processed effects
